title: lippia abyssinica var. pubescens
intro: Lippia abyssinica var. pubescens, also known as Abyssinian lippia, is a variety of the Lippia abyssinica plant, a flowering plant native to East Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Lippia abyssinica var. pubescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent, and can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
